title: Hand (One Sith)

{{Quote|You will now be one of my ''Hands''—my own personal assassin. Henceforth you will take orders ''only'' from me—report ''only'' to me.|Darth Krayt to Darth Talon|<ref name="Legacy 2" />}}
A '''Hand''' was a [[Sith/Legends|member]] of the [[One Sith]] around [[130 ABY]]. They were [[Darth Krayt]]'s most capable servants, trained and existing to carry out his will. They followed only his orders, and reported only to him.

[[File:Scbd8.jpg|thumb|left|Krayt's Hands on Vendaxa]]
By [[137 ABY]], Krayt's only Hand was [[Darth Nihl]], having been given the post when [[Darth Nihl's predecessor|his predecessor]] died unexpectedly during the [[Massacre at Ossus]]. That same [[Standard year/Legends|year]], he made [[Darth Talon]], a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], into his second Hand, a fact that displeased Nihl.

After both Talon and Nihl were [[Skirmish at the Temple of the Sith|grievously injured]] by [[Cade Skywalker]], [[Sith Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Krayt named [[Darth Stryfe]] as his new Hand to replace the demoted [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Nihl.
